name: sentimentalpha-oracle-suite
description: Multi-tool MCP server: social arbitrage suite for autonomous agents. Three Grok-powered oracles with live X search. (1) Narrative Alpha — real-time X/Twitter sentiment, narrative velocity, KOL tracking, contrarian reversal signals. (2) Manipulation Risk — agent safety oracle, pre-trade manipulation check, bot coordination detection + astroturf flags. (3) Convergence Alpha — narrative + on-chain + meme convergence scoring, prediction market delta. Social arbitrage automation: spot cultural trend shifts BEFORE Wall Street. Returns structured JSON: sentiment score (-1.0 to +1.0), manipulation score (0-100), convergence score (0-100), narrative velocity, KOL networks, bot detection flags, on-chain wallet flows, meme virality, prediction market delta. Covers: crypto ($BTC $ETH $SOL DeFi meme coins), stocks ($TSLA $NVDA earnings), macro events (Fed CPI inflation), brands, tech, politics, culture — anything on X. Pay-per-query via x402 micropayments on Base USDC ($0.005/query). MCP-native discovery. Sub-second cached responses (<400ms). Free preview endpoints for evaluation.

tools.name: get_x_narrative_alpha
tools.description: Multi-tool MCP server: social arbitrage suite for autonomous agents. Three Grok-powered oracles with live X search. (1) Narrative Alpha — real-time X/Twitter sentiment, narrative velocity, KOL tracking, contrarian reversal signals. (2) Manipulation Risk — agent safety oracle, pre-trade manipulation check, bot coordination detection + astroturf flags. (3) Convergence Alpha — narrative + on-chain + meme convergence scoring, prediction market delta. Social arbitrage automation: spot cultural trend shifts BEFORE Wall Street. Returns structured JSON: sentiment score (-1.0 to +1.0), manipulation score (0-100), convergence score (0-100), narrative velocity, KOL networks, bot detection flags, on-chain wallet flows, meme virality, prediction market delta. Covers: crypto ($BTC $ETH $SOL DeFi meme coins), stocks ($TSLA $NVDA earnings), macro events (Fed CPI inflation), brands, tech, politics, culture — anything on X. Pay-per-query via x402 micropayments on Base USDC ($0.005/query). MCP-native discovery. Sub-second cached responses (<400ms). Free preview endpoints for evaluation.

ticker.description: Primary ticker or asset symbol. Examples: "$BTC", "$ETH", "$TSLA", "$NVDA", "$SOL"

event.description: Market event or topic. Examples: "Fed rate decision", "ETH ETF approval", "Bitcoin halving", "NVDA earnings"

query.description: Free-form query combining ticker + event + context. Use this if ticker/event split doesn't fit. Examples: "$BTC after Fed pause", "AI agent economy growth"

time_window.description: Analysis time window. Default: 4h. Use 1h for breaking news, 24h for daily sentiment, 7d for trend analysis.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score to include in results. Default: 0.5. Set higher (0.8+) for high-conviction signals only.

velocity.description: Narrative velocity: score (0-100), trend (accelerating/peaking/decelerating/dormant), hourly mentions

key_drivers.description: Top 3-5 narratives with theme, sentiment, strength (0-100), sample take

contrarian.description: Contrarian signal: hasSignal (bool), consensusDivergence (0-100, higher = more reversal risk), description

manipulationRisk.description: Bot/coordination detection: score (0-100), flags array (bot_amplification, coordinated_accounts, low_organic_ratio, astroturf_patterns)

relatedTickers.description: All tickers/assets mentioned in the narrative (e.g. $BTC, $ETH, $COIN)

sources_summary.description: Brief summary of data sources and volume analyzed

cache_ttl.description: Seconds until this result expires. Use for caching decisions.

tools.name: analyze_manipulation_risk
tools.description: Standalone manipulation & coordination risk oracle for X/Twitter narratives. Returns manipulationScore (0-100), riskLevel, flags, and deep evidence of bot farms, coordinated KOL rings, astroturfing, copy-paste brigades, wallet-linked spam, and narrative fingerprinting. The #1 pre-trade safety check for AI agents — call this before any high-stakes action (trade, bet, content decision). Powered by Grok with live X search. Detects: bot amplification, coordinated accounts, timing attacks, hashtag hijacking, paid influencer networks, wash trading correlations, and narrative repetition patterns.

query.description: Ticker, asset, event, or topic to analyze for manipulation. Examples: "$BTC", "PEPE meme coin", "Trump tariffs", "$SOL airdrop"

event.description: Market event or topic. Examples: "Fed rate decision", "token launch"

manipulationScore.description: Overall manipulation risk score 0-100 (0 = organic, 100 = highly suspicious)

riskLevel.description: Risk level: low, moderate, high, or critical

flags.description: Detected manipulation flags: bot_amplification, coordinated_accounts, low_organic_ratio, astroturf_patterns, kols_pumping, wallet_linked_spam, timing_coordinated, hashtag_hijack

evidence.description: Quantitative evidence: botAccountsDetected, coordinatedClusters, organicRatio, topAmplifiers, walletLinkedPosts

recommendation.description: Actionable recommendation for the trading agent

tools.name: analyze_convergence
tools.description: Multi-modal narrative + on-chain convergence oracle. Returns a convergenceScore (0-100) showing how strongly X narrative velocity is aligning with on-chain wallet activity, meme/image virality, and prediction-market pricing. Use this for high-conviction trade signals — extreme convergence (all signals aligned) is rare and highly actionable. Powered by Grok with live X search + on-chain analytics. Combines: narrative velocity, smart money inflows, whale transactions, viral meme strength, Polymarket/Kalshi delta.

query.description: Ticker, asset, event, or topic. Examples: "$BTC", "PEPE meme coin", "Trump tariffs", "$SOL airdrop"

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum convergence threshold (mapped to 0-100 score). Default: 0.5.

convergenceScore.description: Overall convergence score 0-100 (0 = no alignment, 100 = perfect multi-modal convergence)

strength.description: Convergence strength: weak, medium, strong, extreme

predictionMarketDelta.description: Divergence from prediction market odds (-100 to 100). Positive = narrative more bullish than market.

recommendation.description: Actionable trade signal based on convergence analysis
